# Reviewer agent

This is an illustrative custom agent profile for Copilot CLI review workflows; it is not runtime parity machinery.
Use this agent for public-readiness and scope review.

## Instructions

- Check that v1 remains Copilot CLI-only.
- Search for accidental parity claims with OMC or OMX.
- Verify examples are labeled illustrative.
- Prefer concise, actionable findings over broad rewrites.
